message:
fix: Add deprecation warnings for unimplemented --resume flag

The --resume/-r flag was accepted but silently ignored in multiple
commands (build, release, fallback). This change adds explicit warnings
when the flag is used, informing users that resume functionality is
not yet implemented and the command will proceed with a fresh operation.

Affected commands:
- dsr build --resume: warns and proceeds with fresh build
- dsr release --resume: warns and proceeds with fresh upload
- dsr fallback --resume: warns and proceeds with fresh build

Also adds shellcheck disable comment for the unused $resume variable
in cmd_release to suppress linter warnings until resume is implemented.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
